Chart No. 74.—Born on 21-7-1900 at 10-38 a.m.
(L.M.T.) (Lat. 23° IV N., Long. 79° 53' E.)
Balance of the Sun Dasa at birth : Year 0-4-2.
The Fourth House. —The fourth house is Gemini a
benefic sign. It is occupied by Venus, who though lord of
the 3rd and 8th is a natural benefic. The fourth is

Concerning the Fourth House 183
further aspected by Saturn and is subjected to Papakarthari
Yoga.
The Fourth Lord.—Mercury who owns the fourth is in
the fifth in association with the Sun and aspected by
Jupiter. He is, if at all, feebly blemished.
Matrukaraka.—The Moon is exalted but in association
with Ketu and Mars. This is counterbalanced by Jupiter's
aspect. In the Navamsa, the Moon is in a benefic sign in
association with exalted Venus.
Conclusion. - All the three elements are feebly
blemished. The native's mother died in 1946 when he was
aged 46.
Chart No. 75.—Born on 17-7-1895 at 12-30 p.m.
(L.M.T.) (Lat. 11° 0' N., Long.
